ddls:
CREATE TABLE "primates" (
  "primate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each primate */,
  "focal_id" INTEGER /* Focal ID used in observations */,
  "mother_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primate's mother */,
  "id_focal" INTEGER /* ID of the primate in the focal group */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the primate (M/F) */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the primate */,
  "age_months" INTEGER /* Age of the primate in months at the time of observation */,
  "relative_rank" REAL /* Relative social rank of the primate within the troop */,
  "parity" TEXT /* Parity (single/multi) indicating if the primate is from a single or multiple birth */,
  "troop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the troop the primate belongs to */,
  "genetic_sample_id" TEXT /* ID of the genetic sample collected from the primate */,
  "genetic_sample_date" TEXT /* Date when the genetic sample was collected */,
  "genetic_sample_location" TEXT /* Location where the genetic sample was collected */,
  "is_wild" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the primate is wild or captive */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the primate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("primate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_primates_troop_id FOREIGN KEY ("troop_id") REFERENCES troops ("troop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "primate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primate being observed */,
  "date_observation" TEXT /* Date of the observation */,
  "jour_obs_rad" REAL /* Day of the year when the observation was made (in radians) */,
  "year_focal" INTEGER /* Year the primate was in the focal group */,
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observer who made the observation */,
  "t_obs_real" INTEGER /* Time of the observation in minutes */,
  "tantrum" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the primate exhibited a tantrum (0/1) */,
  "uncertainty_birth_days" INTEGER /* Uncertainty in the number of days of the primate's birth */,
  "uncertainty_birth_dayrad" REAL /* Uncertainty in the day of the year of the primate's birth (in radians) */,
  "observation_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the observation */,
  "environmental_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the environmental conditions during the observation */,
  "social_context" TEXT /* Context of the social environment during the observation (e.g., feeding, resting) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_observer_id FOREIGN KEY ("observer_id") REFERENCES observers ("observer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_primate_id FOREIGN KEY ("primate_id") REFERENCES primates ("primate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "troops" (
  "troop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each troop */,
  "troop_name" TEXT /* Name of the troop */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the troop is found */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the troop */,
  "establishment_date" TEXT /* Date when the troop was first observed */,
  "estimated_population" INTEGER /* Estimated number of primates in the troop */,
  "troop_status" TEXT /* Current status of the troop (e.g., stable, declining) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("troop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observers" (
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observer */,
  "observer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the observer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the observer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the observer (e.g., researcher, assistant) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the observer is affiliated with */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the observer */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the observer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social interaction */,
  "primate_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first primate involved in the interaction */,
  "primate_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second primate involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of social interaction (e.g., grooming, aggression) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the interaction in minutes */,
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observer who recorded the social interaction */,
  "interaction_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the interaction */,
  "interaction_location" TEXT /* Location where the interaction occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_interactions_observer_id FOREIGN KEY ("observer_id") REFERENCES observers ("observer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_interactions_primate_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("primate_id_1") REFERENCES primates ("primate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_interactions_primate_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("primate_id_2") REFERENCES primates ("primate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_records" (
  "health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health record */,
  "primate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primate */,
  "health_date" TEXT /* Date of the health record */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the primate in kg */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the primate in cm */,
  "health_condition" TEXT /* Health condition of the primate (e.g., healthy, sick) */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Vaccination status of the primate (e.g., vaccinated, not vaccinated) */,
  "health_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the health record */,
  "veterinarian_id" INTEGER /* ID of the veterinarian who conducted the health check */,
  "treatment_given" TEXT /* Treatment given during the health check */,
  "next_check_date" TEXT /* Date for the next health check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_records_primate_id FOREIGN KEY ("primate_id") REFERENCES primates ("primate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_records_veterinarian_id FOREIGN KEY ("veterinarian_id") REFERENCES observers ("observer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental condition record */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the observation in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the observation in percentage */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the observation (e.g., sunny, rainy) */,
  "food_availability" TEXT /* Food availability during the observation (e.g., high, low) */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed during the observation */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction during the observation */,
  "precipitation" TEXT /* Precipitation during the observation */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility during the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_conditions_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES observations ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "device_used" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES observations ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., behavioral, health) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
